coach.name: Steve J. Ngoumnai
coach.bio: I spent over a decade as an engineering leader, building teams and making hiring decisions. I've reviewed thousands of resumes and interviewed hundreds of candidates. I know exactly what makes someone memorable — and what gets them passed over. Now I help talented professionals stop being invisible and start landing the roles they deserve.

focus.title: You've probably been here
focus.subtitle: Stuck. Frustrated. Wondering what you're doing wrong.

items.title: Applications go nowhere
items.body: You've applied to dozens of roles. Maybe hundreds. Silence. Occasional rejections. No real conversations.

items.title: Promising interviews disappear
items.body: You thought it went well. They seemed interested. Then... nothing. No feedback. No closure.

items.title: You start questioning yourself
items.body: Maybe you're not as good as you thought. Maybe you're asking for too much. Maybe you should just settle.

steps.title: Here's how we get you unstuck
steps.subtitle: A clear path from where you are to where you want to be.

items.title: Get clear
items.body: We figure out exactly what roles fit your experience, what you're worth, and what's been getting in your way.

items.title: Get seen
items.body: Your resume and LinkedIn get rebuilt to actually show your value. Not tasks. Not buzzwords. Real impact.

items.title: Get offers
items.body: You walk into interviews prepared and confident. When offers come, you negotiate from strength.

faq.title: Questions you might have
faq.subtitle: The stuff people usually ask before we talk.

items.question: What types of roles do you help with?
items.answer: Tech, finance, operations, marketing, sales, healthcare administration, and leadership roles. Senior ICs to executives. If you're not sure if we can help, just ask — we'll be honest.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: Most clients land their first real interview within 3 weeks. Full job search timelines vary, but we move fast.

items.question: Do you guarantee I'll get a job?
items.answer: No one can guarantee that. But we can guarantee you'll have the best possible materials, a clear strategy, and real preparation. What you do with it is up to you.

items.question: What if I don't know what role I want?
items.answer: That's more common than you'd think. We start by figuring out where your experience translates best. You don't need to have it all figured out.

items.question: Can you help with negotiation?
items.answer: Yes. We help you understand your leverage, prepare your ask, and handle the conversation. Most clients negotiate significantly more than they would have on their own.

items.question: What if I just need my resume fixed?
items.answer: We offer that a la carte. But honestly, a better resume alone rarely solves the whole problem. We'll help you figure out what you actually need.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Book a call. We'll talk for 15 minutes, figure out where you are, and map out next steps. No pressure.

cta.title: Every week you wait costs you interviews
cta.body: The job market moves fast. Your competition is getting coached. Let's make sure you're not falling behind.
cta.label: Claim My Free Strategy Session
cta.guarantee: Leave with a clear action plan or get a second session free
cta.proofSnippet: Join 147+ professionals who've accelerated their careers

coach.name: Steve J. Ngoumnai
coach.bio: I spent over a decade as an engineering leader, building teams and making hiring decisions. I've reviewed thousands of resumes and interviewed hundreds of candidates. I know exactly what makes someone memorable — and what gets them passed over. Now I help talented professionals stop being invisible and start landing the roles they deserve.

focus.title: The tech hiring loop is broken
focus.subtitle: You're technically strong. But your story isn't landing.

items.title: Pigeonholed by your tech stack
items.body: You've done impactful work across systems, but recruiters only see 'Python developer' or 'AWS engineer.' Your breadth is invisible.

items.title: Stuck at senior when you're ready for staff
items.body: You're doing staff-level work — driving architecture, mentoring, influencing roadmaps — but your title and comp don't reflect it.

items.title: Acing LeetCode but bombing system design
items.body: You can solve algorithms, but when it comes to talking through tradeoffs and leading a design conversation, something's off.

steps.title: How we get engineers and tech leads unstuck
steps.subtitle: A system built for how tech hiring actually works.

items.title: Calibrate your level
items.body: We map your actual scope and impact to what companies pay for at each level. No more underselling yourself as senior when you're operating at staff.

items.title: Build your technical signal
items.body: Your resume shows systems thinking, not just tasks. Your LinkedIn attracts the right recruiters. Your pitch proves you can lead, not just code.

items.title: Close at the right level
items.body: System design prep, behavioral stories, and negotiation coaching so you land the title and comp you've earned.

whyNow.title: Every month you wait costs you level and comp

items.title: Level compression
items.body: Companies are getting stricter on levels. The staff role you'd get today might require principal-level scope in six months.

items.title: Equity timing
items.body: RSU grants compound. One year at the wrong level means hundreds of thousands in lost equity over a 4-year vest.

items.title: Market cycles
items.body: Tech hiring ebbs and flows. The companies you want are hiring now. Don't wait for the next freeze.

for.title: This is for you if
for.body: You're a strong engineer ready to be seen as a technical leader.
items: You're senior+ and ready for staff, principal, or EM track
You've been passed over for promotions or stuck at the same level
You can build systems but struggle to communicate their impact
You want to target FAANG, high-growth, or Series B+ companies

notFor.title: This probably isn't for you if
notFor.body: We specialize in senior+ tech careers.
items: You're a bootcamp grad or early-career engineer building fundamentals
You want to mass-apply to hundreds of roles without strategy
You're looking for LeetCode tutoring, not career positioning

items.question: Do you help with system design interviews?
items.answer: Yes. We prep you to lead design conversations, make tradeoffs, and show the architectural thinking that gets you Staff+ offers. This isn't mock interview spam — it's teaching you how to think out loud like a tech lead.

items.question: What levels do you work with?
items.answer: Senior through Principal IC, plus engineering management. If you're mid-level looking to break into senior, we can help with that jump too.

items.question: How fast will I get interviews?
items.answer: Most clients see callbacks within 2-3 weeks once their materials are dialed in. Tech hiring moves fast when your signal is clear.

items.question: Can you help me switch from IC to EM?
items.answer: Yes. We help you reframe your technical leadership as people leadership. Many of our clients have made that transition.

items.question: What about negotiation?
items.answer: Negotiation is where the real money is. We help you understand your leverage, prep competing offers, and handle the conversation. Most clients negotiate $30K-80K+ above initial offers.

items.question: I just need my resume fixed. Is that an option?
items.answer: We offer that a la carte, but honestly — a resume alone rarely solves the whole problem. We'll help you figure out what you actually need.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Book a strategy call. I'll review your materials beforehand, and we'll map out your path in 15 minutes. No pitch, just clarity.

focus.title: Your numbers are strong. Your story isn't.
focus.subtitle: Revenue leaders face unique positioning challenges.

items.title: Your wins get credited to the product
items.body: You closed the deal, expanded the account, saved the renewal — but your resume reads like a territory report, not a revenue story.

items.title: AE? AM? Enterprise? Strategic?
items.body: Title inflation makes it hard to compare. Companies can't tell if you're a true enterprise closer or a mid-market rep with a fancy title.

items.title: Comp conversations go sideways
items.body: You know what you're worth, but explaining your earnings mix — base, variable, accelerators — confuses hiring managers and leaves money on the table.

items.title: Position for the right segment
items.body: Enterprise vs. mid-market. Hunter vs. farmer. We clarify your lane so you attract the right opportunities at the right level.

items.title: Close with compensation clarity
items.body: Negotiation prep for base, OTE, accelerators, and equity so you maximize total comp, not just the first number they throw out.

items.question: How do I talk about quota attainment if my numbers varied?
items.answer: Everyone has quarters that didn't land. We help you frame the narrative around your strongest periods, explain context where needed, and show trajectory over snapshots.

items.question: I'm moving from SMB to enterprise. Can you help?
items.answer: Yes. Moving upmarket is about proving you can handle longer cycles, bigger stakeholder maps, and complex deals. We help you tell that story.

items.question: What about commission structures and OTE?
items.answer: Comp is where we add the most value. We help you understand market rates, structure your ask, and negotiate base, variable, accelerators, and equity.

items.answer: Yes — Director, VP, CRO-track. The positioning shifts from individual contribution to team performance, hiring, and strategy.

items.question: How do I show strategic impact when my role was analytical?
items.answer: Every analysis leads to a decision. We help you connect your work to outcomes — deals that happened, costs that didn't, risks that were avoided.

items.question: I'm in FP&A. Can I move to strategy or corporate development?
items.answer: Yes. We help you reframe your analytical work as strategic influence and prepare for case-based interviews.

items.question: What about controller to CFO transitions?
items.answer: That's a common path. We help you show strategic breadth beyond the close — investor relations, capital allocation, board communication.

items.question: Do you help with ops and supply chain roles too?
items.answer: Yes — operations, supply chain, procurement leadership. The positioning principles are similar: show business impact, not just process.

items.question: How fast will I get interviews?
items.answer: Most clients see callbacks within 3-4 weeks. Finance hiring can be slower, but well-positioned candidates move fast.

items.question: I just need help with my resume. Is that an option?
items.answer: We offer that a la carte, but honestly — a resume alone rarely solves the whole problem. We'll help you figure out what you actually need.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Book a strategy call. I'll review your materials beforehand, and we'll map out your path in 15 minutes. No pitch, just clarity.

faq.title: Questions legal and compliance leaders ask
faq.subtitle: Before we talk.

items.question: How do I quantify risk prevention?
items.answer: Every compliance program has counterfactuals — fines that didn't happen, lawsuits prevented, audits passed. We help you estimate and articulate that value.

items.question: I'm in compliance. Can I move to a GC-track role?
items.answer: Yes. We help you show strategic breadth — advising on deals, policy, business decisions — not just regulatory compliance.

items.question: What about healthcare administration roles?
items.answer: We work with healthcare leaders in operations, quality, compliance, and administration. The positioning principles are similar: show business and patient outcomes.

items.question: Do you help with in-house vs. firm transitions?
items.answer: Yes — both directions. Moving in-house requires showing business judgment. Moving to a firm requires showing client-facing skills.

items.question: How fast will I get interviews?
items.answer: Most clients see callbacks within 3-4 weeks. Legal and compliance hiring can be relationship-driven, but strong positioning accelerates it.

items.question: I just need help with my resume. Is that an option?
items.answer: We offer that a la carte, but honestly — a resume alone rarely solves the whole problem. We'll help you figure out what you actually need.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Book a strategy call. I'll review your materials beforehand, and we'll map out your path in 15 minutes. No pitch, just clarity.
